title: Jājpur Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Jājpur, with a Z-Score of +4.94. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Jājpur is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 16.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 66%, and the wind speed is 8.1 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The Heat Wave has a significant impact on the city, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating no need for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Jājpur.
